summary: ACCEPT: Final read-only branch review of chore/m0-exit-enter-m1 finds the M0 exit gate record and MILESTONE-AUTONOMY-AMENDMENT-001 integration acceptable. docs/GATE-M0.md records M0_GATE=PASS with commit, PR, F001-F008 CLOSED, reviewer handoffs, test/CI evidence, risks, and product-owner approval. PROJECT_STATUS.md moves to M1 without changing frozen decisions. goal-mode state clears the M0 human gate, sets current_milestone M1, leaves active_threads empty, and preserves R4/frozen/M5 human gates. docs/27 changes only authorize ordinary M1-M4 auto exits under acceptance matrix, CI/validation, independent reviewer ACCEPT, and no R4/frozen gate; M5 remains a Human Gate.

decisions: ACCEPT: Final systems architecture review approves this branch diff for M0 gate/status integration.
ACCEPT: MILESTONE-AUTONOMY-AMENDMENT-001 is process-only and does not alter product/platform/core architecture/frozen historical policy decisions.

Current diff is working-tree/untracked branch payload based on e99b348, not a new commit yet; lead should persist this addendum and commit/integrate normally.
